approvalSource: Steve gave GREEN LIGHT for the revised CHANGE-LOG-COMPREHENSIVE-001 plan with hard coverage thresholds and explicit UI/API/privacy gates.
notes: Approval covers only the comprehensive Foundation changelog layer on System Activity, the additive /api/foundation/change-log endpoint, source-backed backfill from existing evidence, verifier/process coverage, and manual UI proof. It does not approve Daily Exec Summary, source lifecycle expansion, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, corpus work, research cleanup, or a new feature lane.
